session.user:
Run fast CI checks and report results:
```bash make fast-ci ```
Report the output. DO NOT modify any files - you are read-only.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast CI checks and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI checks (linting, formatting, type checking)

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results
**Status: FAILED** - Exit code 2
### Summary
The fast CI checks completed with mixed results. Most checks passed, but **Prettier formatting check failed** for 2 markdown files:
**Prettier Issues (2 files need formatting):** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing Checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check: 1,738 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec Reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5,924 passed in 14.84s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.49s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.83s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
### Action Required
Two markdown files need Prettier formatting applied. These are the only blockers preventing the fast CI from fully passing.
